title: HoppingWindow
content:
# HoppingWindow

Inherits from: BaseTimeWindow


Overlapping time windows when hop_size is smaller than window_size.


## Methods


### __init__(assets: List[str], inputs: List[str], queue: asyncio.Queue[AssetDataMessage], window_size: timedelta, hop_size: timedelta) -> None
summary: Overlapping time windows when hop_size is smaller than window_size.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.application import HoppingWindow

# Usage example
app = HoppingWindow()
